Evidence tool: gene-set enrichment among a module's hub genes

Source: R/tool_geneset_enrichment.R
geneset_enrichment_tool.Rd

Offline GO/pathway enrichment (GeneOverlap::newGOM()) over hub genes against local GMT gene-set libraries (fgsea::gmtPathways()) – no runtime network access, so the tool is deterministic and CI-clean by construction. Touches the ModuleSet adapter contract (gene_membership(), expression(), pkg_versions()) plus ctx$params$db_files, a named vector of local GMT file paths.

Usage

geneset_enrichment_tool(ctx)

Arguments

ctx

A tool context list: list(ms, module_id, params), as built by run_module(). ctx$params$n_hubs (default 25) is the number of hub genes tested. ctx$params$db_files (required for a non-empty result) is a named character vector of local GMT file paths, e.g. c(GO_BP = 'path/to/GO_Biological_Process.txt').

Value

An evidence_fragment of type 'geneset_enrichment'.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
ms <- sentit_example_moduleset()
geneset_enrichment_tool(list(
    ms = ms, module_id = modules(ms)[1],
    params = list(n_hubs = 10, db_files = c(GO_BP = 'path/to/gene_sets.gmt'))
))
} # }
